title: Automatically Reorder Queue on Change
description: The system shall automatically reorder the queue when a change occurs (addition, removal, or modification of an item).
rationale: To ensure that the queue always reflects the updated order based on changes detected.
business_value: Improves the accuracy and reliability of the queue data, enhancing user experience and operational efficiency.

source.description: As a user I need the system to reorder the queue when a change occurs So that the queue reflects the updated order based on the change

acceptance_criteria: Given the queue has items in a specific order
When a change is made to the queue
Then the queue is automatically reordered according to the defined rules
postconditions: The queue reflects the updated order based on the detected change
functional_constraints: The system must detect additions, removals, and modifications of items in the queue
The system must reorder the queue automatically upon detecting a change
edge_cases: What happens if the system detects a change while it is in the process of reordering?
How should the system handle changes made during periods of high concurrency?
What are the implications of detecting and handling a large number of concurrent changes?

interfaces.name: Queue Management System
interfaces.description: The requirement interacts with the internal system responsible for managing the queue data.

test_cases.description: Add an item to the queue and verify it is placed correctly.
test_cases.expected_result: The new item should be added to the correct position in the queue based on predefined rules.

test_cases.description: Remove an item from the queue and verify its absence.
test_cases.expected_result: The removed item should no longer appear in the queue.

test_cases.description: Modify an existing item's position in the queue.
test_cases.expected_result: The modified item should be moved to its new position according to the updated rules.
